title: paeonia delavayi subsp. angustiloba
intro: Paeonia delavayi subsp. angustiloba, a subspecies of the Paeonia delavayi plant, is a type of flowering plant in the peony family (Paeoniaceae). This plant is used in traditional Chinese medicine and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Paeonia delavayi subsp. angustiloba include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and aid in the healing of wounds and skin conditions. Paeonia delavayi subsp. angustiloba is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions, including arthritis, fever, and digestive issues.
